calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared with Joe Madona on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company. Limited Scope Attorney Molly Harcos, Esq. appeared for and with defendant Warren Clark.

Settlement Conference Held. Case Settled. Parties sign off on Settlement Agreement and, in the Event of Default, Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to premises located at 516 O'Farrell Street, #307, San Francisco, California. See scanned document. Trial date vacated.

Hon Frank Drago/Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
